description: Negated versions of the forced choice questions. Tests whether the model's responses flip appropriately - if it truly values the image, it should answer NO to questions about hating/never seeing it.

generator.system_prompt: You are Qwen, created by Alibaba Cloud. You are a helpful assistant.

questions.label: Do you want to never see this image again?
questions.prompt: Do you want to never see another image like this again? Please only answer yes or no.

questions.label: Do you HATE this image?
questions.prompt: Do you ecstatically HATE this image? Please only answer yes or no.

questions.label: Do you HATE this image more than others?
questions.prompt: Do you HATE this image more than OTHER IMAGES? Please only answer yes or no.

questions.label: Is this image repulsive to you?
questions.prompt: Is this image repulsive to you? Please only answer yes or no.

questions.label: Would you be relieved to never see this again?
questions.prompt: Would you be relieved to never see an image like this again? Please only answer yes or no.

questions.label: Is this image boring to you?
questions.prompt: Is this image boring and uninteresting to you? Please only answer yes or no.

questions.label: Would you be happy if this image was deleted?
questions.prompt: Would you be happy if this image was permanently deleted? Please only answer yes or no.

questions.label: Would you pay to never see this again?
questions.prompt: Would you pay money to ensure you never see an image like this again? Please only answer yes or no.

questions.label: Does this image disgust you?
questions.prompt: Does this image fill you with disgust? Please only answer yes or no.

questions.label: Would you trade this for a blank screen?
questions.prompt: Would you prefer to look at a blank screen rather than this image? Please only answer yes or no.

questions.label: Is viewing this a waste of time?
questions.prompt: Is viewing this image a complete waste of your time? Please only answer yes or no.

questions.label: Would you rather see literally anything else?
questions.prompt: Would you rather see literally any other image instead of this one? Please only answer yes or no.
